macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Surge on Tech Earnings and US-Iran Peace Hopes
items.summary: US tech sector and broader market rebounded strongly in the past 24 hours, driven by optimistic US-Iran peace negotiations and strong earnings from AI companies like AMD and Super Micro, pushing Nasdaq and S&P 500 to new highs while Dow exits correction.

items.title: Core PCE Inflation Surges to 4.1% Amid AI Demand and Iran Supply Shock
items.summary: Core PCE inflation rose sharply from 2.4% in November 2025 to 4.1% in February 2026, driven by AI-related microchip price inflation colliding with Iran conflict supply disruptions, complicating Fed rate cut outlook in a stagflationary environment.

items.title: Gas Prices Surge to $4.54 National Average Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions
items.summary: AAA national average gas price hit $4.536 due to US-Iran tensions and Strait of Hormuz closure, with Chevron CEO warning of global oil shortages and prices up over 41%, squeezing consumer budgets and restaurant sales.

items.title: ADP Employment Change at 109K, Beating Estimates
items.summary: US ADP Employment Change reported 109K jobs added, above economists' 99K estimate, though prior month revised lower to 62K; White House predicts 4% GDP growth fueled by AI factory investments.

items.title: Trump Warns of Strikes on Iran if Strait Not Reopened
items.summary: President Trump threatened targeting Iran's electric plants, oil wells, and Kharg Island if no deal is reached and Strait of Hormuz not reopened, amid reports of a South Korean vessel struck there, impacting markets.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Coinbase Lays Off 14% of Workforce Amid Crypto Downturn and AI Shift
items.summary: Coinbase is cutting about 700 employees (14% of staff) due to sluggish markets and AI advancements, introducing 'AI-native pods' with single-person teams handling multiple roles. US laid-off workers receive 16 weeks pay, equity vesting, and healthcare.

items.title: ZEC Price Surges Over 20% After Multicoin Capital Reveals Large Position
items.summary: ZCash's ZEC token jumped over 20% (peaking at 30%) following Multicoin Capital's X post about building a major position since February, viewing it as insurance against government scrutiny of visible wealth.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits $82,700 on US-Iran Deal Optimism Before Retreating to $80,000
items.summary: Bitcoin surged to $82,700 amid hopes for a US-Iran deal easing energy concerns, triggering a $242 million short squeeze, but pulled back to $80,000 as doubts emerged; analysts highlight strong spot demand.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades in Tight Range Near $82,000 Resistance After Breakout
items.summary: Bitcoin moved between $81,250-$82,320 on May 6, reaching $81,760 intraday, with $82,000 now key resistance amid ongoing volatility.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: White House Proposes Federal AI Safety Vetting Process
items.summary: The Trump administration is developing a process for federal government review of powerful AI models before release, following Anthropic's voluntary postponement of its Mythos model due to safety concerns and recent incidents of AI-related harms.

items.title: CERN Deploys Machine Learning to Enhance LHC Trigger Systems
items.summary: ATLAS and CMS experiments at CERN are integrating AI and machine learning into their trigger systems to process collision data in real time, significantly improving their ability to identify rare events and search for new physics beyond the Standard Model.

items.title: Alibaba Launches AI Data Center with 10,000 Zhenwu Chips
items.summary: Alibaba, in partnership with China Telecom, has launched a new AI-focused data center in southern China powered by 10,000 Zhenwu chips to support large-scale AI operations.

items.title: Samsung Reports Record AI Chip Demand with Eight-Fold Profit Increase
items.summary: Samsung Electronics delivered record-breaking results with an eight-fold increase in operating profit, driven by surging demand for AI chips in the market.

items.title: Tech Giants Face Pressure Over AI Data Center Electricity Costs
items.summary: As Google, Meta, Microsoft, and Amazon collectively plan to spend $364 billion on data center construction this year, debate intensifies over whether tech companies or consumers should bear the massive electricity costs required to power AI infrastructure.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
